pi_items.source: Task description (line 5: 'Create a new survey with that title. 1. Create a new survey with that title') and verifier.py (line 49 checks for survey found with pattern 'Springfield')
Task description (line 5: 'Create a question group named "Budget Allocation"') and export_result.sh structure which queries for question groups
Task description (line 5: 'Add a "Multiple Numerical Input" question (Code: BUDGET)') and verifier.py (line 44 queries for BUDGET question, line 65 checks type K)
Task description (line 6: 'Add a second "Long free text" question (Code: REASON)') and export_result.sh (line 63 queries for REASON question) and verifier.py (line 104 checks for reason_question)

Task description (line 5: 'Add these 5 sub-questions: Public Safety (SAFE), Infrastructure (INFRA), Parks & Recreation (PARK), Health Services (HLTH), General Government (GOV)') and verifier.py (line 88: expected_subs = ["SAFE", "INFRA", "PARK", "HLTH", "GOV"])

Task description (line 5: 'enforce that answers must sum to exactly 100 (Equals sum value = 100)') and export_result.sh (line 53 queries equals_num_value) and verifier.py (line 80: checks equals_sum_value == '100')
Task description (line 7: 'ONLY appears if the Infrastructure allocation (INFRA) is greater than 40') and verifier.py (line 108: checks for '40' in relevance equation)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Participatory Budgeting survey titled 'Springfield 2026 Budget Consultation' with a 'Budget Allocation' question group. The primary question uses code 'BUDGET', type Multiple Numerical Input, with five sub-questions coded SAFE, INFRA, PARK, HLTH, and GOV. Responses must sum to exactly 100 using a slider layout. A secondary 'Long free text' question with code 'REASON' is conditionally shown when Infrastructure (INFRA) allocation exceeds 40. The survey must be activated to pass verification.
